reviews.author: The MY World
reviews.text: It's temple on the mountain. You have to go up the long stairs to get the temple, but it's not hard much. But the stairs are a bit slippery, so be careful to go up and down. The temple on the top is not so big, but nice atmosphere. It seems like you can go to the other temple from the top.

reviews.author: Hoang Nguyen
reviews.text: Entrance fee is 10K VND/pax. Some ladies at the entrance gate offers motorbike service at 30K VND/pax/one-way to the pagoda. It’s fair for senior ppl who are not at good health for climbing up abt 150m (~15 mins).

reviews.author: Nathan Wilson
reviews.text: A pagoda at the top of a hill which you access by walking up the steps and going past people's homes. It was very quiet and peaceful when I got to the top. You need to pay a little money for parking and an entrance ticket.

reviews.author: Phil Ipp
reviews.text: What a lovely place! A temple on a small mountain with absolutely stunning architecture and interior. Very peaceful atmosphere.

reviews.author: Haji irany
reviews.text: It was a very beautiful place. The rice fields around this place added to its beauty. Be sure to buy from local vendors

reviews.author: Tuyen Tiet
reviews.text: Cost 10k vnd for a ticket. It looks empty, seem like there is no tourist coming here.

reviews.author: Minh Hoang
reviews.text: What a Lovely ancient pagoda and I am excited to explore and learn about the architecture

reviews.author: Yes Reality
reviews.text: The pagoda was once described in contemporary Vietnamese poetry

reviews.author: Tony Thai
reviews.text: A nice place to visit. The pagoda is partly ancient. I think that they had to rebuild a part of it.

reviews.author: Nghiêm Trọng
reviews.text: 10.000 vnđ for entrance fee to a pagoda , it's wweirddd! Beautiful pagoda btw.

reviews.author: Alexander Judt
reviews.text: Very beautiful temple at the top of the hill.

reviews.author: Gun Ho
reviews.text: Best old traditional pagoda in the area.

reviews.author: Le Hoang
reviews.text: Should be a visiting place for calm and quiet

reviews.author: Thế Ngô Hữu
reviews.text: Must see the ancient architect here
